key_finding: Strong independent convergent evidence for hidden channel hypothesis from 5+ research groups. 'Causal bypass' (CMI metric) shows bypass regimes where CoT has zero causal influence. KV cache steering proves separable channels constructively. GQA vs MHA plausibly explains Qwen/Llama encoding difference. Hypothesis upgraded from WEAKENING to REFRAMED.
evidence_impact: Core hypothesis STRENGTHENED by independent literature. Architecture-specific findings (SNR cliff, PGD) reframed as GQA/MHA effect, not falsification. Text bottleneck framing now mainstream in latent reasoning community.
next_planned: GQA mechanism test (compare MHA vs GQA models), H2O heavy-hitter overlap with AC positions, or temporal AC/TC dynamics study

natural_usage.status: partial — literature connects to KV compression
